name: Carsbuck inc
description_short: Used car dealer in Brooklyn, NY offering in-house auto financing with sub-prime lending for buyers with poor or no credit history.
description_long:
Carsbuck Inc. is a used car dealership headquartered in Brooklyn, New York at 776 Coney Island Avenue, operating since 2003. The company serves the tri-state area including Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island, and multiple New Jersey towns (Jersey City, Hoboken, Bayonne, Union City, and others). Their primary business is selling pre-owned vehicles across multiple brands and body styles, not providing standalone personal loans.

The company offers a full-service dealership experience centered on auto sales and in-house financing. Their inventory includes 15+ major brands (Honda, Nissan, Toyota, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Lexus, Audi, and others) spanning sedans, SUVs, minivans, and trucks. Beyond vehicle sales, they provide auto financing through relationships with banks and lending institutions, extended service contracts and warranties, test drive scheduling, and service appointments. Their finance department emphasizes sub-prime lending and claims to work with applicants who have good, bad, or no credit history.

Carsbuck distinguishes itself through guaranteed credit approval messaging and explicit sub-prime financing options. They operate extended showroom hours (10 AM–8 PM Monday–Saturday) and provide bilingual service ("Se Habla Español"). All vehicles are inspected before sale, and they offer multiple financing tiers with pricing ranging from under $10,000 to over $20,000. Their website emphasizes accessibility for credit-challenged buyers.

However, Carsbuck is fundamentally a used car dealer offering dealer financing, not an independent personal lender or loan provider. Their business model depends on vehicle sales; financing is a tool to facilitate those sales, not their primary product. While they do finance purchases for sub-prime borrowers, they do not offer personal loans for non-automotive purposes like debt consolidation or medical expenses. Consumers seeking standalone personal loans should look elsewhere.
pros: Explicit sub-prime financing options for borrowers with poor or no credit history
Relationships with multiple banks and lending institutions for varied financing options
All vehicles inspected and eligible for extended service contracts and warranties
Extended showroom hours (10 AM–8 PM Monday–Saturday) for working customers
Broad geographic service area across NY and NJ tri-state region
Multiple inventory price tiers ($10K–$20K+) and financing calculator on website
cons: Company is a used car dealer, not an independent lender—financing is tied to vehicle purchase only
'Guaranteed credit approval' claim is vague and typical dealer marketing language without specific approval rates or terms disclosed
No transparency on APR ranges, loan terms, or typical payments for sub-prime borrowers
Website does not disclose warranty details, service contract terms, or extended coverage costs
No independent reviews, ratings, or third-party lender data provided to verify sub-prime lending claims
best_for: Credit-challenged buyers (poor or no credit) seeking to purchase a used vehicle with in-house financing
Tri-state area residents (NY/NJ) needing a reliable used car dealer with bilingual service
Buyers looking for pre-inspected used vehicles with warranty and service contract options
diagnosis: Carsbuck Inc. is best for credit-challenged car buyers in the Brooklyn/New Jersey area who need immediate vehicle financing with minimal documentation. The critical caveat is that this is a used car dealer offering dealer financing tied to vehicle purchase—not an independent personal lender offering standalone loans for non-auto purposes like debt consolidation or emergency cash.
services: Used car sales (sedans, SUVs, minivans, trucks across 15+ brands)
In-house auto financing for good, bad, and no-credit borrowers
Sub-prime auto lending through bank partnerships
Extended service contracts and warranties on inventory
Used car inventory search and filtering tools
